mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM eval_type_52 ORDER BY year DESC

WITH ScoreBase AS ( SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, d.name AS deptName, e.dept_id AS deptId, e.position AS position, ISNULL(lv.name, '-') AS levelName, e.level_id AS levelId, (SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(q.weight) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(SUM(a.score) AS FLOAT) / SUM(q.weight) * 100 END FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 0 AND m2.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%성과%' AND status = 1)) AS perfSelf, (SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(q.weight) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(SUM(a.score) AS FLOAT) / SUM(q.weight) * 100 END FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%성과%' AND status = 1)) AS perfFirst, CASE ISNULL(pm.status, -1) WHEN 0 THEN '본인평가중' WHEN 1 THEN '1차평가대기' WHEN 2 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '-' END AS perfStatus, (SELECT SUM(a.score * q.weight) FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 0 AND m2.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%역량%' AND status = 1)) AS compSelf, (SELECT SUM(a.score * q.weight) FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%역량%' AND status = 1)) AS compFirst, CASE ISNULL(cm.status, -1) WHEN 0 THEN '본인평가중' WHEN 1 THEN '1차평가대기' WHEN 2 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '-' END AS compStatus, CASE WHEN pm.id IS NULL AND cm.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ISNULL( (SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(q.weight) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(SUM(a.score) AS FLOAT) / SUM(q.weight) * 100 END FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%성과%' AND status = 1) ) * ISNULL(w2.weight, 50) / 100.0 + (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(a.score * q.weight), 0) FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%역량%' AND status = 1) ) * ISNULL(w3.weight, 50) / 100.0 , 0) END AS totalScore, CASE WHEN pm.id IS NULL AND cm.id IS NULL THEN 0 /* 같은 팀 매핑된 사원 전원 완료 체크 */ WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_target_mapping_52 mc JOIN eval_type_52 tc ON mc.eval_type_id = tc.id JOIN employee_52 ec ON mc.evaluatee_no = ec.emp_no WHERE ec.dept_id = e.dept_id AND ec.position = '부서원' AND ec.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (tc.name LIKE '%성과%' OR tc.name LIKE '%역량%') AND mc.step IN (0, 1) AND mc.status != 2) = 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_target_mapping_52 mc2 JOIN eval_type_52 tc2 ON mc2.eval_type_id = tc2.id JOIN employee_52 ec2 ON mc2.evaluatee_no = ec2.emp_no WHERE ec2.dept_id = e.dept_id AND ec2.position = '부서원' AND ec2.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (tc2.name LIKE '%성과%' OR tc2.name LIKE '%역량%') AND mc2.step IN (0, 1)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS allDone, fr.grade AS confirmedGrade, CASE WHEN fr.status = 1 THEN '확정' ELSE '미확정' END AS confirmStatus, fr.reason AS reason, fr.weight_ratio AS weightRatio FROM employee_52 e JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN code_common_52 lv ON e.level_id = lv.id AND lv.group_id = 1 LEFT JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 pm ON pm.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND pm.step = 0 AND pm.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%성과%' AND status = 1) LEFT JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 cm ON cm.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND cm.step = 0 AND cm.eval_type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%역량%' AND status = 1) LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON fr.emp_no = e.emp_no AND fr.year = #{year} LEFT JOIN dept_eval_weight_52 w2 ON w2.dept_id = e.dept_id AND w2.type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%성과%' AND status = 1) LEFT JOIN dept_eval_weight_52 w3 ON w3.dept_id = e.dept_id AND w3.type_id = (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%역량%' AND status = 1) WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.position = '부서원' AND e.emp_no = #{empNo} AND e.dept_id = #{deptId} ), RankedScore AS ( SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY deptId ORDER BY totalScore DESC) AS pctRank FROM ScoreBase WHERE allDone = 1 ) SELECT s.empNo, s.empName, s.deptName, s.deptId, s.position, s.levelName, s.perfSelf, s.perfFirst, s.perfStatus, s.compSelf, s.compFirst, s.compStatus, s.totalScore, CASE WHEN s.allDone = 1 THEN CASE WHEN r.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_s, 10) / 100.0 THEN 'S' WHEN r.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_a, 30) / 100.0 THEN 'A' WHEN r.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_b, 70) / 100.0 THEN 'B' WHEN r.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_c, 90) / 100.0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'D' END ELSE NULL END AS totalGrade, s.confirmedGrade, s.confirmStatus, s.reason, s.weightRatio FROM ScoreBase s LEFT JOIN RankedScore r ON s.empNo = r.empNo LEFT JOIN dept_eval_grade_52 g ON g.dept_id = s.deptId ORDER BY s.deptName, s.levelId DESC, s.empNo

WITH LeaderBase AS ( SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, d.name AS deptName, e.dept_id AS deptId, e.position AS position, ISNULL(lv.name, '-') AS levelName, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m_chk JOIN eval_type_52 t_chk ON m_chk.eval_type_id = t_chk.id WHERE m_chk.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND t_chk.name LIKE '%다면%' AND m_chk.step = 1 AND m_chk.status != 2) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m_chk2 JOIN eval_type_52 t_chk2 ON m_chk2.eval_type_id = t_chk2.id WHERE m_chk2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND t_chk2.name LIKE '%다면%' AND m_chk2.step = 1) THEN (SELECT AVG(CAST(sub.total AS FLOAT)) FROM ( SELECT m2.id, SUM(a.score) AS total FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_type_52 t2 ON m2.eval_type_id = t2.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.status = 2 AND t2.name LIKE '%다면%' GROUP BY m2.id) AS sub) ELSE NULL END AS multiAvgScore, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN '평가전' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN m2.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN CONCAT('평가중 (0/', COUNT(*), '명)') WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN m2.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(*) THEN '평가완료' ELSE CONCAT('평가중 (', SUM(CASE WHEN m2.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), '/', COUNT(*), '명)') END FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m2 JOIN eval_type_52 t2 ON m2.eval_type_id = t2.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND t2.name LIKE '%다면%') AS multiStatus, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m_chk JOIN eval_type_52 t_chk ON m_chk.eval_type_id = t_chk.id WHERE m_chk.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND t_chk.name LIKE '%다면%' AND m_chk.step = 1 AND m_chk.status != 2) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m_chk2 JOIN eval_type_52 t_chk2 ON m_chk2.eval_type_id = t_chk2.id WHERE m_chk2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND t_chk2.name LIKE '%다면%' AND m_chk2.step = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS allDone, fr.grade AS confirmedGrade, CASE WHEN fr.status = 1 THEN '확정' ELSE '미확정' END AS confirmStatus, fr.reason AS reason, fr.weight_ratio AS weightRatio FROM employee_52 e JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN code_common_52 lv ON e.level_id = lv.id AND lv.group_id = 1 LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON fr.emp_no = e.emp_no AND fr.year = #{year} WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.position = '부서장' AND e.emp_no = #{empNo} AND e.dept_id = #{deptId} ), RankedLeader AS ( SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY multiAvgScore DESC) AS pctRank FROM LeaderBase WHERE allDone = 1 ) SELECT lb.empNo, lb.empName, lb.deptName, lb.deptId, lb.position, lb.levelName, lb.multiAvgScore, lb.multiStatus, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LeaderBase lb2 WHERE lb2.allDone = 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eval_target_mapping_52 mx JOIN eval_type_52 tx ON mx.eval_type_id = tx.id WHERE mx.evaluatee_no = lb2.empNo AND tx.name LIKE '%다면%' AND mx.step = 1)) = 0 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LeaderBase WHERE allDone = 1) > 0 THEN CASE WHEN rl.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_s, 10) / 100.0 THEN 'S' WHEN rl.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_a, 30) / 100.0 THEN 'A' WHEN rl.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_b, 70) / 100.0 THEN 'B' WHEN rl.pctRank <= ISNULL(g.grade_c, 90) / 100.0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'D' END ELSE NULL END AS totalGrade, lb.confirmedGrade, lb.confirmStatus, lb.reason, lb.weightRatio FROM LeaderBase lb LEFT JOIN RankedLeader rl ON lb.empNo = rl.empNo LEFT JOIN dept_eval_grade_52 g ON g.dept_id = 'LEADER' ORDER BY lb.deptName, lb.empNo

SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.dept_id AS deptId, ( SELECT ISNULL( (SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(q.weight) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(SUM(a.score) AS FLOAT) / SUM(q.weight) * 100 END FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.eval_type_id = 2 ) * ISNULL(w2.weight, 50) / 100.0 + (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(a.score * q.weight), 0) FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.eval_type_id = 3 ) * ISNULL(w3.weight, 50) / 100.0 , 0) FROM (SELECT 1 AS dummy) AS t LEFT JOIN dept_eval_weight_52 w2 ON w2.dept_id = e.dept_id AND w2.type_id = 2 LEFT JOIN dept_eval_weight_52 w3 ON w3.dept_id = e.dept_id AND w3.type_id = 3 ) AS totalScore, fr.grade AS currentGrade, ISNULL(fr.status, 0) AS confirmStatus FROM employee_52 e LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON fr.emp_no = e.emp_no AND fr.year = #{year} WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.position = '부서원' AND e.dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY totalScore DESC

SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.dept_id AS deptId, ( SELECT AVG(CAST(sub.total AS FLOAT)) FROM ( SELECT m2.id, SUM(a.score) AS total FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m2 ON a.mapping_id = m2.id JOIN eval_type_52 t2 ON m2.eval_type_id = t2.id WHERE m2.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no AND m2.step = 1 AND m2.status = 2 AND t2.name LIKE '%다면%' GROUP BY m2.id ) AS sub ) AS totalScore, fr.grade AS currentGrade, ISNULL(fr.status, 0) AS confirmStatus FROM employee_52 e LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON fr.emp_no = e.emp_no AND fr.year = #{year} WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.position = '부서장' ORDER BY totalScore DESC

SELECT d.name AS deptName, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN fr.grade = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cntS, SUM(CASE WHEN fr.grade = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cntA, SUM(CASE WHEN fr.grade = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cntB, SUM(CASE WHEN fr.grade = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cntC, SUM(CASE WHEN fr.grade = 'D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cntD FROM final_result_52 fr JOIN employee_52 e ON fr.emp_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE fr.status = 1 AND fr.year = #{year} GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY d.name
mapper.update: IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM final_result_52 WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} AND year = #{year}) BEGIN UPDATE final_result_52 SET grade = #{grade}, final_score = #{finalScore}, reason = #{reason}, weight_ratio = #{weightRatio}, updated_at = GETDATE(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} AND year = #{year} /* status는 수정 안 함 - 확정 후에도 저장해도 확정 상태 유지 */ END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO final_result_52 (emp_no, grade, final_score, status, reason, year, weight_ratio, updated_by, created_at) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{grade}, #{finalScore}, 0, #{reason}, #{year}, #{weightRatio}, #{updatedBy}, GETDATE()) END
UPDATE eval_target_mapping_52 SET status = 2, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND step = 0 AND eval_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM eval_type_52 WHERE year = #{year})
